Tax Reporting

1099-K Filing Required

YTD $273,125 > $600 threshold

Stripe will issue your 1099-K form by January 31, 2027 for tax year 2026. It will reflect all payments processed through your Stripe Connect account. Consult your accountant for estimated quarterly payments.

Open Stripe Express Tax Dashboard ↗

Q2 Estimated Tax Due: June 15, 2026

Based on YTD net of $273,125, your projected Q2 estimated payment is approximately $20,484 (self-employment + federal income at 25% effective rate). Consult your CPA — this is an estimate only.

Access Level Reference

Admin (Mike): Full ledger — YTD gross, net, fees, all transactions, 1099-K section, CSV export.

Office Assistant: In-Progress custodial holds only. Net payout history and tax section are hidden. Export is disabled.

Permissions configured in Delegate Inbox.
